label: Transparent Drosophila melanogaster motif
workflow: Generated with the built-in image tool on a flat chroma-key background, then processed with remove_chroma_key.py.
postProcess: Removed the flat green key to produce an RGBA transparent PNG.
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Drosophila transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only one isolated adult Drosophila melanogaster specimen for a Morphous design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: an accurate adult fruit fly, Drosophila melanogaster, full body visible in a clean natural specimen presentation, red compound eyes, amber tan thorax, warm banded abdomen, translucent veined wings held naturally over the body, fine bristles on thorax and legs, delicate antennae, small dark feet, believable insect anatomy and scale. The identity must read as Drosophila fruit fly, not housefly, mosquito, bee, wasp, gnat, dragonfly, or generic fly.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; slight three-quarter side profile, face angled to the right, entire body, both wings, legs, antennae, eye shape, and abdomen bands visible without cropping. Keep silhouette crisp and readable.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves the red compound eyes, amber body, translucent wing membranes, fine wing veins, and bristle details. Natural specimen mood, polished but not laboratory props.
Transparent workflow: place the insect on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, lighting variation, or texture. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the insect.
Constraints: no fruit, no microscope, no petri dish, no lab bench, no pin, no label, no second insect, no landscape, no leaves, no flowers, no housefly, no mosquito, no bee, no wasp, no dragonfly, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no watermark, no text.

label: Morphous Drosophila light design-system board
workflow: Generated after the motif asset, then normalized to the catalog board size.
postProcess: Padded and resampled the generated source board to 3840 x 2160 without distorting its layout.
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Drosophila light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board titled exactly "Morphous Drosophila" with subtitle "Drosophila melanogaster natural specimen system". It must be derived from the Drosophila melanogaster motif generated in the previous step: red compound eyes, amber tan thorax, warm banded abdomen, translucent veined wings, fine bristles, delicate antennae, and compact fruit-fly anatomy. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible natural specimen interface system.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 design-system presentation, intended final asset 3840 x 2160. Make it feel like a polished 4K product design board with large readable labels, precise grid, and no tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Drosophila, Drosophila melanogaster, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Asset Examples.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from the fruit fly motif: compound-eye red, amber abdomen bands, translucent wing membrane, fine wing veins, bristle ink, specimen cream, thorax umber, subtle wing blue-gray, and fruit-gold highlights. The board must read as a natural Drosophila specimen and morphology catalog system, not a laboratory, genetics, or experiment-management UI.
Visible UI vocabulary: use field and specimen words only, such as Overview, Specimens, Morphology, Wing Veins, Habitat, Orchard Edge, Field Notes, Observation, Collection, Reports, Media, Settings. Japanese labels may include 標本, 形態, 翅脈, 観察, 採集, 記録, 設定. Do not show words like Lab, Laboratory, Experiment, Genetics, Genotype, Strain, Assay, Vial, Incubator, Microscope, Sequencing, Protocol, or Culture.
Typography: English specimen catalog and observation UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; use short readable labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Noto Sans JP, Japanese UI, headings, body, labels, numbers. Use tabular numbers for specimen counts and observation metrics.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, segmented control, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, natural specimen navigation sidebar, top nav, breadcrumb, table rows, data filters, command search palette, date picker, pagination, empty/loading/error/success states, progress, stepper, tooltip, dropdown menu, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, area chart, spacing scale, radius samples, border tokens, shadow tokens, texture samples, small natural specimen icon set, token swatches.
Charts: include visible line, bar, donut, and area charts using compound-eye red, amber abdomen, fruit gold, wing blue-gray, band taupe, and bristle ink.
Style: crisp shadcn/tweakcn product UI, restrained 8px card radius, natural-history specimen-tray layouts, fine wing-vein dividers, subtle bristle-line texture, translucent wing-membrane panels, compact observation dashboards, pale slide-ivory background, specimen-cream cards, bristle-ink text, compound-eye red primary actions, amber focus rings, band-taupe separators.
Color palette labels to show: Slide Ivory, Specimen Cream, Compound Eye Red, Amber Abdomen, Fruit Gold, Wing Veil, Wing Blue Gray, Band Taupe, Thorax Umber, Bristle Ink.
Generated asset examples: show abstract wing-vein texture strips, specimen-card thumbnails, and morphology icons only; do not show lab vials, petri dishes, microscopes, test tubes, fruit props, or lab benches.
Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the fruit fly. Avoid unrelated saturated colors.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no lab equipment, no lab vocabulary, no microscope, no petri dish, no vial, no test tube, no lab bench, no fruit props, no housefly label, no mosquito, no bee, no wasp, no generic purple or blue gradient dominance, no stock photo collage, no extra animals, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Drosophila", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Morphous Drosophila dark design-system board
workflow: Generated after the light board as the same system translated into dark mode.
postProcess: Padded and resampled the generated source board to 3840 x 2160 without distorting its layout.

UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, segmented control, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, natural specimen navigation sidebar, top nav, breadcrumb, table rows, data filters, command search palette, date picker, pagination, empty/loading/error/success states, progress, stepper, tooltip, dropdown menu, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, area chart, spacing scale, radius samples, border tokens, shadow tokens, texture samples, small natural specimen icon set, token swatches.

Visual details: deep bristle-ink background, thorax-umber cards, pale wing-veil text, compound-eye red primary actions, amber abdomen focus rings, fruit-gold highlight metrics, wing blue-gray borders, fine wing-vein dividers, subtle bristle texture overlays, restrained shadows, crisp shadcn/tweakcn-compatible controls and dashboards.

Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the fruit fly. Avoid unrelated saturated colors.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no lab equipment, no lab vocabulary, no microscope, no petri dish, no vial, no test tube, no lab bench, no fruit props, no housefly label, no mosquito, no bee, no wasp, no neon nightclub palette, no pure flat black background, no generic purple or blue gradient dominance, no stock photo collage, no extra animals, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Drosophila", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
